title: Uruguayan Cheese Empanadas
description: A classic Uruguayan pastry filled with a deliciously crumbly cheese mixture, perfect for a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: uruguayan cheese
ingredients.notes: such as quesillo or queso crema

instructions: Roll out pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
In a bowl, mix together cheese, onion, garlic, egg, salt, and pepper.
Place a spoonful of the cheese mixture onto one half of each dough circle.
Brush the edges of the dough with olive oil.
Fold the other half of the dough circle over the cheese mixture and press edges to seal.
Use a fork to crimp the edges of the empanadas.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with olive oil.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
